title: gava` #1478
definition:
1) to expire, die, perish, give up the ghost, yield up the ghost,
     be dead, be ready to die
     1a) (Qal) to expire, die, be about to die
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to expire, die, perish, give up the ghost, yield up the ghost,
     be dead, be ready to die
     1a) (Qal) to expire, die, be about to die

    NASB:  to expire, perish, die
